Author: Stan
Name: Unlock List
Punchline: Track FFXIV unlockables and open their map locations.
Description: Shows unlockable content, marks completed quest-backed entries when possible, keeps manual state for unsupported entries, opens map flags for known locations, can mark NPCs or retainer bells then run /gtf, and can run Lifestream shortcuts. Commands: /vunlock, /npc <name>, /bell, /inn, /mb, /jumbobuy
